eyebrow.zh: 重试 · 恰好一次 · 浏览器 Agent

headline.zh:
Agent 重试点了一次下单
而不是两次
headline.en:
Your agent retries the order once
not twice

sub.zh: 给浏览器 Agent 的每一步套上客户端生成的幂等键——自愈重试在请求出去之前就被去重，慢但成功的提交不会再下一次单。
sub.en: Wrap each browser-agent step with a client-generated idempotency key so a self-healing retry is deduplicated before the request ever leaves — a slow-but-successful submit no longer places the order twice.

title.zh: 慢提交 + 自愈重试 = 一次，不是两次
title.en: Slow submit + self-healing retry = once, not twice

body.zh: 浏览器 Agent 的自愈层会在“看起来失败”时重驱点击。可一次发生在成功提交之后的重试没有幂等概念，于是订单被下了两遍。给那一步套上客户端生成的键，重试在网络边界直接变成无操作。
body.en: A browser agent's self-healing layer re-drives any click that looks failed. But a retry fired after a slow-but-successful submit has no notion of idempotency, so the order is placed twice. Wrap that step with a client-generated key and the retry becomes a no-op at the network boundary.

chips: › 重试被抑制时对账单可见

title.zh: 真 HTTPS 结账页也能去重
title.en: Dedup works against real HTTPS checkout pages

body.zh: 浏览器把真实结账流量走 HTTPS 隧道。IdemStep 用本地可信的中间人终止隧道、解密流量，对它跑同一套去重逻辑——不只是明文测试页面。
body.en: A browser sends real checkout traffic over an HTTPS tunnel. IdemStep terminates the tunnel with a locally-trusted cert, decrypts the traffic, and runs the same dedup over it — not just plaintext test pages.

title.zh: 不想自己运维代理？用托管版
title.en: Don't want to run the proxy? Use the hosted one

body.zh: 跨站拦截层自己可靠地跑起来很难。把远端 Playwright 指向托管端点，多个操作者共用一个 URL、彼此命名空间隔离，享受托管的“恰好一次”——单操作者鉴权与路由已就绪。
body.en: The cross-site interception layer is genuinely hard to self-host reliably. Point a remote Playwright context at the hosted endpoint; multiple operators share one URL in isolated namespaces for managed exactly-once — single-operator auth and routing are ready today.

chips: › 多操作者按 key 隔离

title.zh: 崩溃重启不丢已下单的键
title.en: A crash and restart doesn't lose the keys you already placed

body.zh: 幂等状态原子写盘，重启后还在；写盘遇到磁盘问题时改为软失败，继续在内存里做对的决定，而不是把系统错误抛给 Agent。长时间跑的托管代理还会自动清扫过期键。
body.en: Idempotency state is written atomically so it survives a restart. A disk error fails soft — the in-memory store keeps making the right call instead of surfacing a system error to the agent. A long-running hosted proxy even sweeps its own expired keys.

headline.zh: 让你的 Agent 重试时不再多扣一次
headline.en: Stop your agent from charging twice on a retry

sub.zh: 三步：装包、起代理、把那一步包进 idemStep()。
sub.en: Three steps: install, start the proxy, wrap the step in idemStep().

tag.zh: 浏览器 Agent 重试的幂等键层 · 开源 Apache-2.0
tag.en: The idempotency-key layer for browser-agent retries · open source Apache-2.0
